head: Data Scientist
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 超过 100 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

WorldQuant develops and deploys systematic financial strategies across a broad range of asset classes and global markets. We seek to produce high-quality predictive signals (alphas) through our proprietary research platform to employ financial strategies focused on market inefficiencies. Our teams work collaboratively to drive the production of alphas and financial strategies – the foundation of a balanced, global investment platform.

WorldQuant is built on a culture that pairs academic sensibility with accountability for results. Employees are encouraged to think openly about problems, balancing intellectualism and practicality. Excellent ideas come from anyone, anywhere. Employees are encouraged to challenge conventional thinking and possess an attitude of continuous improvement.

Our goal is to hire the best and the brightest. We value intellectual horsepower first and foremost, and people who demonstrate an outstanding talent. There is no roadmap to future success, so we need people who can help us build it.
The Role 岗位职责

WorldQuant is seeking exceptional individuals to join the firm as a Data Scientist. While prior finance experience is not required, a successful candidate must possess a strong interest in learning about finance and global markets.
Perform analysis and generate models of financial datasets using machine learning techniques 运用机器学习的方法分析并构建金融数据模型
Verify the integrity of unstructured data and turn data into potentially valuable insights 验证非结构化数据的价值并将数据转化成潜在的高质量的市场洞见
Develop and create data that seek to predict the movement of financial market by applying variety of algorithmic techniques 应用各种算法技术开发并构建可尝试预测金融市场波动的数据
What We Offer 你将会获得
Competitive compensation 有竞争力的薪资
Join our established mentoring program and receive one-on-one guidance by an accomplished advisor 完善的导师培训机制、一对一师从资深从业者
Develop a global vision with opportunities to exchange ideas with various teams in WorldQuant global offices. 国际化视野，与WorldQuant 全球各地多个团队共事、交流
Flexibility of self-managed work progress, comfortable working environment, rich employee activities, and generous employee benefits 灵活自主安排工作进度，舒适的办公环境、丰富的员工活动及优渥的员工福利
What You'll Bring 你需要具备

Pursuing a B.S., M.S. or Ph.D. degree from a leading university in related fields (e.g. Electrical Engineering, Physics, Computer Science, Mathematics, Financial Engineering, Big Data) 正在攻读相关领域的本科、硕士或博士学位（例如电子工程，物理，计算机科学，数学，金融工程, 大数据等）
Candidates should be graduating in 2025 or 2026 候选人需于2025年或2026年毕业
Demonstrated ability of at least one programming language, e.g. C++, python, etc.
familiar with systems like Linux/Unix 熟练掌握至少一种编程语言，如C++、python等； 熟悉Linux/Unix等操作系统
Research experience in NLP, Deep Learning is a plus 有自然语言处理、深度学习、人工智能等研究经验者优先
Good English reading and writing skills 良好的英语读写能力
If any issues encountered accessing the online application webpage or if you have any questions, please mail your latest CV to or contact us at
[email protected]
如无法浏览在线申请网页或您有任何疑问，请将您的简历或问题发送至
[email protected]
The position is based in our research office in
Beijing
or
Shanghai
预期工作地点为
北京
或
上海
的研究办公室。
By submitting this application, you acknowledge and consent to terms of the
WorldQuant Privacy Policy.

The privacy policy offers an explanation of how and why your data will be collected, how it will be used and disclosed, how it will be retained and secured, and what legal rights are associated with that data (including the rights of access, correction, and deletion). The policy also describes legal and contractual limitations on these rights. The specific rights and obligations of individuals living and working in different areas may vary by jurisdiction.
Copyright © 2025 WorldQuant, LLC. All Rights Reserved.

WorldQuant is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate in hiring on the basis of race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation or preference, age, marital status, citizenship, national origin, disability, military status, genetic predisposition or carrier status, or any other protected characteristic as established by applicable law.
1. Perform analysis and generate models of financial datasets using machine learning techniques 运用机器学习的方法分析并构建金融数据模型
2. Verify the integrity of unstructured data and turn data into potentially valuable insights 验证非结构化数据的价值并将数据转化成潜在的高质量的市场洞见
3. Develop and create data that seek to predict the movement of financial market by applying variety of algorithmic techniques 应用各种算法技术开发并构建可尝试预测金融市场波动的数据
1. Competitive compensation 有竞争力的薪资
2. Join our established mentoring program and receive one-on-one guidance by an accomplished advisor 完善的导师培训机制、一对一师从资深从业者
3. Develop a global vision with opportunities to exchange ideas with various teams in WorldQuant global offices. 国际化视野，与WorldQuant 全球各地多个团队共事、交流
4. Flexibility of self-managed work progress, comfortable working environment, rich employee activities, and generous employee benefits 灵活自主安排工作进度，舒适的办公环境、丰富的员工活动及优渥的员工福利

1. Pursuing a B.S., M.S. or Ph.D. degree from a leading university in related fields (e.g. Electrical Engineering, Physics, Computer Science, Mathematics, Financial Engineering, Big Data) 正在攻读相关领域的本科、硕士或博士学位（例如电子工程，物理，计算机科学，数学，金融工程, 大数据等）
2. Candidates should be graduating in 2025 or 2026 候选人需于2025年或2026年毕业
3. Demonstrated ability of at least one programming language, e.g. C++, python, etc.; familiar with systems like Linux/Unix 熟练掌握至少一种编程语言，如C++、python等； 熟悉Linux/Unix等操作系统
4. Research experience in NLP, Deep Learning is a plus 有自然语言处理、深度学习、人工智能等研究经验者优先
5. Good English reading and writing skills 良好的英语读写能力
company_box_content: WorldQuant is a global quantitative asset management firm with over $7 billion in assets under management. Founded in 2007 by Igor Tulchinsky with the belief that talent is global, but opportunity is not, WorldQuant has more than 1,000 employees spread among 27 global offices. WorldQuant seeks to get to the future faster, guided by the principle that there are an infinite number of insights to discover. The firm develops and deploys investment strategies across a variety of asset classes in global markets. For more information on WorldQuant’s philosophy and culture, please visit www.worldquant.com.
company_description: A global quantitative asset management firm with over $7 billion in assets under management and more than 1,000 employees across 27 offices. It focuses on developing systematic financial strategies using machine learning and algorithmic techniques to predict market movements.

head: Sr. Business Analyst/Data Analyst Marketplace Strategy (MPS) - Strategy Adaptability Team
info: 中国 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 2 周前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Data Analyst / Business Analyst / Sr Data Analyst
DiDi International Business Group (IBG) - Marketplace Strategy (MPS) - Strategy Adaptability Team (SA)
Marketplace Strategy Adaptability
【关于我们】
滴滴自2018年初收购巴西出行平台99开始，正式启动了国际化战略。目前，滴滴的国际业务覆盖了拉美、亚太和非洲的14个国家，为当地市场提供以出行为主、涵盖外卖和金融的多样化服务。

Join our dynamic Marketplace Team in China where you'll leverage data to uncover insights that shape our marketplace strategies and enhance our customer experience. If you're passionate about transforming data into actionable solutions and want to contribute to a purpose-driven organization, we want to hear from you! Together, let's create a brighter future through informed decision-making and innovative analytics.
Apply now and be part of our journey!
【About Team】
我们是滴滴国际化交易策略适配团队。国际化业务是集团的重要增长方向，我们将深入国际化交易策略和交易市场，运用机器学习、因果推断等量化方法，解决交易策略在各地区的适配问题。团队开放、年轻、多元化。在日常工作中，你将有机会和算法、运营等团队进行深入交流，相信在持续创造价值的同时，你也将拥有长足的个人成长空间。
【Responsibility】
• Conduct quantitative research in marketplace strategy to understand and identify opportunities in optimization
• Develop statistical, optimization and ML models for strategy analysis
• Facilitate quantitative analysis to support regional operation
• Present findings to senior management to inform business decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams across disciplines to drive system development end-to-end from idea to production
【Qualification】
• Master's degree (highly preferred) in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering or similar disciplines
• 1 - 3 year's experiences working in data science or business analytics related field
• GPA - 3.5 or higher is preferred
• Strong proficiency in query language (e.g. SQL) and programming skills (e.g. Python, R)
• Knowledge in Machine Learning, Causal Inference and Optimization Methodology is a plus
• Strong presentation skills in Mandarin and English
company_box_content: DiDi Global Inc. is a leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across Asia Pacific, Latin America, and other global markets, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, designated driving, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as certain energy and vehicle services, food delivery, and intra-city freight services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry, and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental, and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive, and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.
company_description: A leading mobility technology platform offering ride-hailing, food delivery, and other services across Asia Pacific, Latin America, and other global markets. It leverages AI and data science for marketplace strategy and optimization.

head: 高级商业/数据分析师 Strategy Optimization Analyst
info: 中国 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 1 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
DIDI IBG (International Business Group) Marketplace,Marketplace Strategy,Strategy Optimization
高级数据/商业分析师 职位链接：https://talent.didiglobal.com/social/p/52959
工作地点：上海静安区灵石路718号滴滴百川大厦
【关于我们】
滴滴自2018年初收购巴西出行平台99开始，正式启动了国际化战略。目前，滴滴的国际业务覆盖了拉美、亚太和非洲的14个国家，为当地市场提供以出行为主、涵盖外卖和金融的多样化服务。
【关于team】
我们是滴滴国际化交易策略优化团队。作为滴滴最重要的增长方向之一，国际化出行业务，我们专注于深入分析国际化交易策略和产品策略。通过应用机器学习、数学建模和因果推断等先进方法，我们致力于策略的创新孵化、迭代与适配分析，以推动策略落地并解决区域性问题。我们的团队拥有包容、年轻和多元的文化。同时，我们为团队成员提供完善的培养机制和广阔的发展空间。
【岗位职责】
• Explore theoretical analysis of supply-demand equilibrium in the micro-level spatial temporal dimension
• Build statistical, optimization, and machine learning models for a range of applications
• Use data to understand product performance and to identify opportunities
• Present findings to senior management to inform business decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams across disciplines to drive system development end-to-end from idealization to production
【任职资格】
• Master's degree (highly preferred) in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering or similar disciplines
• 1-5 yr working experience in top consulting/major technology companies
• Knowledge of underlying mathematical foundations of statistics, machine learning, optimization, economics, and analytics
• Strong analytical capability and problem-solving skills
skills in data analytics and experience in data-driven operation management preferred
• Strong business communication and influencing skills in both English and Chinese
• Mission-driven entrepreneurship
company_box_content: DiDi Global Inc. is a leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across Asia Pacific, Latin America, and other global markets, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, designated driving, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as certain energy and vehicle services, food delivery, and intra-city freight services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry, and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental, and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive, and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.
company_description: A leading mobility technology platform with a global presence, focusing on ride-hailing and other app-based services. The role involves advanced data analysis, machine learning, and optimization for international business growth.

head: 高级数据分析师 (Marketplace Diagnosis)
info: 中国 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 1 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
【关于我们】
滴滴自2018年初收购巴西出行平台99开始，正式启动了国际化战略。目前，滴滴的国际业务覆盖了拉美、亚太和非洲的14个国家，为当地市场提供以出行为主、涵盖外卖和金融的多样化服务。

Join our dynamic Marketplace Team in China where you'll leverage data to uncover insights that shape our marketplace strategies and enhance our customer experience. If you're passionate about transforming data into actionable solutions and want to contribute to a purpose-driven organization, we want to hear from you! Together, let's create a brighter future through informed decision-making and innovative analytics.
Apply now and be part of our journey!
【About the team】
我们是滴滴国际化交易市场诊断团队。国际化出行业务作为滴滴最重要的增长方向之一，我们深入其最核心的交易市场方向，运用机器学习、算法、因果推断等量化模型，解决各个区域的资源分配&收益管理问题，闭环产出方案、落地策略。团队包容、年轻、多元。团队有着完善的培养机制、足够的空间等着你来大展拳脚！
Job Responsibility,
• Conduct diagnostic research in macro supply & demand and user persona to achieve business goals
• Develop & align core decision-making frameworks across multi-functional teams, and propose feasible strategies
• Facilitate quantitative analysis to support regional operation
• Present analytical results to the leadership team
• Collaborate with other teams to implement & evaluate tests in order to understand different strategy use-cases and refine framework by scenarios
Qualification,
• Master's degree (highly preferred) in Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering or similar disciplines
• 1 - 5 year's experiences working in data science or business analytics related field
• GPA - 3.5 or higher is preferred
• Strong proficiency in query language (e.g. SQL) and programming skills (e.g. Python, R)

It offers a wide range of app-based services across Asia Pacific, Latin America, and other global markets, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, designated driving, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as certain energy and vehicle services, food delivery, and intra-city freight services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry, and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental, and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive, and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.
company_description: A leading mobility technology platform operating in multiple countries, using AI and data-driven innovations. The position focuses on diagnostic research, machine learning, and quantitative analysis for marketplace strategies.

head: AI Engineer
info: 中国 北京市 · 2 周前 · 54 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
岗位职责
1. 参与设计并实现基于大模型的AI应用方案；
2. 参与构建与优化 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）系统，协助数据检索、模型调优与性能优化；
3. 学习并掌握 Transformer 架构及主流预训练模型（如BERT、Llama、GPT等），探索其在不同业务场景中的应用；
4. 负责数据集的收集、清洗与标注工作，支持模型训练与测试实验，并参与基于实验反馈的模型改进；
5. 与跨职能团队（产品、算法、工程）协作，支持AI模型的API部署与产品功能落地；
6. 持续关注 Web3、区块链与AI结合方向 的最新研究进展，参与创新应用探索项目。
任职要求
1. 计算机科学、人工智能、机器学习、数据科学或相关专业，本科及以上学历；
2. 具备扎实的编程基础，熟悉 Python / Java / Go 等至少一种语言；
3. 了解 Transformer 模型原理，对LLM、大语言模型或RAG系统有基础理解；
4. 熟悉数据处理与分析流程，如数据预处理、ETL、SQL、Pandas、向量数据库等；
5. 了解深度学习框架（PyTorch / TensorFlow）；
6. 具备良好的学习能力、逻辑思维与问题解决能力，能主动探索AI与业务结合的创新应用；
7. 有以下经历者优先：
1. 曾参与RAG或大模型微调项目（课程、科研、实习均可）；
2. 了解Web3 / 区块链基础知识；
3. 在AI竞赛、开源项目中有贡献记录（如GitHub、Kaggle）
company_box_content: Cobo is a trusted leader in digital asset custody and wallet infrastructure solutions. Founded in 2017 by blockchain pioneers, Cobo is trusted by more than 500 organizations worldwide, safeguarding billions of dollars in assets with a zero-incident security track record.

Today, Cobo provides the industry’s only unified digital asset wallet platform that integrates all 4 wallet technologies in one place – Custodial Wallets, MPC Wallets, Smart Contract Wallets, and Exchange Wallets. By combining a comprehensive suite of wallet solutions with advanced risk controls and developer tools, Cobo empowers organizations and developers to innovate and scale with ease.
company_description: A digital asset custody and wallet infrastructure provider trusted by over 500 organizations worldwide, offering secure wallet solutions for cryptocurrencies and blockchain applications.

head: 数据科学家 Data Scientist（太仓）
info: 中国 江苏省 太仓市 · 重新发布时间: 5 天前 · 12 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

Schaeffler is a dynamic global technology company and its success has been a result of its entrepreneurial spirit and long history of private ownership. Does that sound interesting to you? As a partner to all of the major automobile manufacturers, as well as key players in the aerospace and industrial sectors, we offer you many development opportunities.
Global Position Name
Data Scientist
Responsibilities

For this position, you will design and develop AI/ML solutions using a combination of traditional machine learning, deep learning, large language models (LLMs), generative AI, and intelligent agents to address various manufacturing challenges. Typical tasks include:
Developing predictive maintenance models using sensor data and time series forecasting techniques.
Implementing quality prediction and defect detection models leveraging computer vision and deep learning.
Applying large language models and generative AI for intelligent knowledge management, natural language understanding, and decision support.
Creating intelligent agents to optimize production scheduling and operational workflows.
Collaborating with plant engineers and domain experts to identify data-driven opportunities and validate AI models in real manufacturing settings.
Communication: You will visualize, explain, and present AI/ML results, from traditional models to advanced generative AI solutions, to ensure clear understanding by business stakeholders.
Implementation: You will work closely with software and automation teams to integrate AI solutions into manufacturing execution systems for real-time production support.
Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science, AI, Data Science, Applied Mathematics, Mechanical Engineering, or related disciplines.
5+ years of professional experience in AI/ML, including traditional machine learning, deep learning, and modern large model/LLM technologies
manufacturing domain experience is preferred.
Proficient in Python and familiar with machine learning libraries such as scikit-learn, XGBoost, LightGBM, as well as deep learning frameworks like PyTorch and TensorFlow.
Experience with large language models (e.g., GPT, BERT), generative AI frameworks, and transfer learning techniques.
Hands-on with typical manufacturing datasets: time series sensor signals, image/video data for vision tasks, text data for NLP applications.
Ability to design, train and deploy AI models that integrate multi-source heterogeneous data for manufacturing problem-solving.
Strong communication skills in English, both written and oral.
Proactive, collaborative, analytical mindset with good problem-solving skills and ability to work under pressure.

As a global company with employees around the world, it is important to us that we treat each other with respect and value all ideas and perspectives. By appreciating our differences, we inspire creativity and drive innovation. In this way, we contribute to sustainable value creation for our stakeholders and society as a whole. Together, we advance how the world moves.
Exciting assignments and outstanding development opportunities await you because we impact the future with innovation. We look forward to your application.
www.schaeffler.com/careers
Your Contact
Schaeffler (China) Co., Ltd.
Yan Hong
Keywords: Experienced
Engineer
Full-Time
Limited
Digitalization & Information Technology

1. For this position, you will design and develop AI/ML solutions using a combination of traditional machine learning, deep learning, large language models (LLMs), generative AI, and intelligent agents to address various manufacturing challenges. Typical tasks include:
2. Developing predictive maintenance models using sensor data and time series forecasting techniques.
3. Implementing quality prediction and defect detection models leveraging computer vision and deep learning.
4. Applying large language models and generative AI for intelligent knowledge management, natural language understanding, and decision support.
5. Creating intelligent agents to optimize production scheduling and operational workflows.
6. Collaborating with plant engineers and domain experts to identify data-driven opportunities and validate AI models in real manufacturing settings.
7. Communication: You will visualize, explain, and present AI/ML results, from traditional models to advanced generative AI solutions, to ensure clear understanding by business stakeholders.
8. Implementation: You will work closely with software and automation teams to integrate AI solutions into manufacturing execution systems for real-time production support.
1. Developing predictive maintenance models using sensor data and time series forecasting techniques.
2. Implementing quality prediction and defect detection models leveraging computer vision and deep learning.
3. Applying large language models and generative AI for intelligent knowledge management, natural language understanding, and decision support.
4. Creating intelligent agents to optimize production scheduling and operational workflows.
5. Collaborating with plant engineers and domain experts to identify data-driven opportunities and validate AI models in real manufacturing settings.
1. Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science, AI, Data Science, Applied Mathematics, Mechanical Engineering, or related disciplines.
2. 5+ years of professional experience in AI/ML, including traditional machine learning, deep learning, and modern large model/LLM technologies; manufacturing domain experience is preferred.
3. Proficient in Python and familiar with machine learning libraries such as scikit-learn, XGBoost, LightGBM, as well as deep learning frameworks like PyTorch and TensorFlow.
4. Experience with large language models (e.g., GPT, BERT), generative AI frameworks, and transfer learning techniques.
5. Hands-on with typical manufacturing datasets: time series sensor signals, image/video data for vision tasks, text data for NLP applications.
6. Ability to design, train and deploy AI models that integrate multi-source heterogeneous data for manufacturing problem-solving.
7. Strong communication skills in English, both written and oral.
8. Proactive, collaborative, analytical mindset with good problem-solving skills and ability to work under pressure.
company_box_content: 关于舍弗勒 舍弗勒集团75余年来始终秉承开拓创新精神，致力于推动驱动技术的创新与发展。依托在电驱动、低碳驱动、底盘应用和可再生能源领域提供创新技术、产品和服务，舍弗勒集团致力于成为值得信赖的合作伙伴，让驱动技术在整个产品生命周期中更高效、更智能、更可持续。舍弗勒集团的产品和服务覆盖整个驱动技术生态系统，涉及八大产品领域，包括从轴承解决方案、各类直线导轨系统到维修和监测服务等丰富的产品和服务组合。舍弗勒集团目前拥有约110,000名员工，在全球55个国家和地区设有250多个分支机构，是全球最大家族企业之一，也是德国最具创新力公司之一。
company_description: Schaeffler is a dynamic global technology company with a history of private ownership, partnering with major automobile manufacturers and key players in aerospace and industrial sectors. It employs about 110,000 people across 55 countries and 250+ branches, focusing on innovation in e-drive, low-carbon drive, chassis applications, and renewable energy.

head: AI Engineer
info: 中国 北京市 · 2 周前 · 54 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
岗位职责
1. 参与设计并实现基于大模型的AI应用方案；
2. 参与构建与优化 RAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation）系统，协助数据检索、模型调优与性能优化；
3. 学习并掌握 Transformer 架构及主流预训练模型（如BERT、Llama、GPT等），探索其在不同业务场景中的应用；
4. 负责数据集的收集、清洗与标注工作，支持模型训练与测试实验，并参与基于实验反馈的模型改进；
5. 与跨职能团队（产品、算法、工程）协作，支持AI模型的API部署与产品功能落地；
6. 持续关注 Web3、区块链与AI结合方向 的最新研究进展，参与创新应用探索项目。
任职要求
1. 计算机科学、人工智能、机器学习、数据科学或相关专业，本科及以上学历；
2. 具备扎实的编程基础，熟悉 Python / Java / Go 等至少一种语言；
3. 了解 Transformer 模型原理，对LLM、大语言模型或RAG系统有基础理解；
4. 熟悉数据处理与分析流程，如数据预处理、ETL、SQL、Pandas、向量数据库等；
5. 了解深度学习框架（PyTorch / TensorFlow）；
6. 具备良好的学习能力、逻辑思维与问题解决能力，能主动探索AI与业务结合的创新应用；
7. 有以下经历者优先：
1. 曾参与RAG或大模型微调项目（课程、科研、实习均可）；
2. 了解Web3 / 区块链基础知识；
3. 在AI竞赛、开源项目中有贡献记录（如GitHub、Kaggle）
company_box_content: Cobo is a trusted leader in digital asset custody and wallet infrastructure solutions. Founded in 2017 by blockchain pioneers, Cobo is trusted by more than 500 organizations worldwide, safeguarding billions of dollars in assets with a zero-incident security track record.

Today, Cobo provides the industry’s only unified digital asset wallet platform that integrates all 4 wallet technologies in one place – Custodial Wallets, MPC Wallets, Smart Contract Wallets, and Exchange Wallets. By combining a comprehensive suite of wallet solutions with advanced risk controls and developer tools, Cobo empowers organizations and developers to innovate and scale with ease.
company_description: Cobo is a trusted leader in digital asset custody and wallet infrastructure solutions, founded in 2017 and trusted by over 500 organizations worldwide. It provides a unified wallet platform integrating custodial, MPC, smart contract, and exchange wallets, with advanced risk controls and developer tools for innovation in blockchain and Web3.
